textByHashes.2a8baa7972ea194bb3d3ebe8b4f140043d5c37ad: How can I be of assistance?
textByHashes.ea6d9be24e9e8da9a02a831ebcc122b5d927109b: Extended cup o' char? E's got it all wrong, mate. We know those alchemi-whatsits are up ta somefin' weird in building this tower, wot wiv all the machinery, and until we get some answers we're not movin a muscle.
textByHashes.8cc9587bb419beb5fbba35b2ec4749917164d5be: Only builders are allowed in there, like. You don't look like much ov a builder to me.
textByHashes.39672d51d86833a9f06e2936512a8d7dd9721f75: Okay. Come to me kitted out like a builder - hard hat, some boots, scruffy trousers and shirt - and I'll let ya try out ta be one ov us.
textByHashes.3ab8fe3249c7f92249d724a68d1656e37f2252dd: Well, if it ain't the wannabe builder!
textByHashes.0ec4f335187cddd6933a96c6753894944dbaffae: Ya don't seem to be able ta remember anyfin'... Dearie me.
textByHashes.52d8a4de62033f4aa4cece3150b64ba1de2b5651: Come back to me wearin' a hard hat, some scruffy trousers, a good top and some hard boots. Yow shud fand some around 'ere.
textByHashes.8528bb801e86b7dd350757e7f4fab05968667d01: Like a builder frew and frew! Good job - now it's time to test your skills.
textByHashes.e9b4134d1219b7804e71a757f2d2ef4b0b03a970: It's not building skills that makes a true builder, you have to have the right mental attitude, yeah?
textByHashes.18063a1d2562552ae6bd4dd7b79fdc1d799fda81: You've plenty of work to do, but you need a drink fast - what do you go for?
textByHashes.dd820c39f1c741a4daa1d96ddbda674787f35ed9: What are you? A healthy builder? Of course, not juice!
textByHashes.4bab7d8d38f21df2d22c4b10303e20524e4dc06b: What on Gielinor are you doing? Get out of my sight.
textByHashes.fa332af6fed9a540b399d09c0f41e8a7e16e024e: You know, you have quite a talent there.
textByHashes.366e405baafba0b67d73ecc54c1ea39758fe9d1c: What's a good sign that you need to replace your trousers?
textByHashes.d071c6469e3c7c9f0ca5e8c50cadedc6d1a89ee5: Exactamondo! Glad to see you are thinking like a builder.
textByHashes.bf1b9f033dabc6328974fbb506a1ce22c12731f7: Yes, obviously if your legs are cold, you lost your trousers altogether!
textByHashes.30203b7137d1c1a71d7c27611beb23436d21cf58: Now the last question - what do you do if you cut your finger?
textByHashes.bba66b4347a952a4559ed44abaa4abde2c790fcd: When was the last time you saw a builder cry?
textByHashes.9db0aaed83817555bb937c217bada1821b87558c: Exactly, you're gettin the hang of this quickly!
textByHashes.1bc9fce6020f69505c7061d3e97d71e68e661e89: Cosmic! I canna see no reason why ya can't go in t'tower now. But be careful, there be some precarious situations in there.
textByHashes.196e40cec24c8f79b6d75d31b3833bbbe333a4c3: Well, there's a pipe system, a pressure machine and a strange cage up at the top that needs finishing off. The alchemists couldn't explain what they were for.
textByHashes.12a8a9fd18a8ffdc5ef266a6f07bcde21ec8349b: Look, , let me give you a bit of advice. If you want to look weak, that's the best way to go.
textByHashes.92ab4b75554477b6a6ca558f56b375337db5ece2: No, no, no. That's the only way they should be!
textByHashes.17174855b38a4240914b539ebd3f2a251e9a5590: Oh no, you're really not getting the hang of this are you?
textByHashes.9ee8b2340b9ffe5abb65efa23e7b26f3410bc163: Ooh, get Mr Fancy Pants here and his posh wine! You're no builder.
textByHashes.53ff2d41d41287dd90a93f9517e0e0d4c155b0ea: Hi, 'Kelsew the Builder'! Been into the tower yet?
textByHashes.5df81ae9ed0f65888e799f385dbac48f1f014a0b: Yep, told ya so. Any idea what those alchemists are up ta?
textByHashes.d86bddb4a0025b3baa6f4ee6c0921d44efcb4789: So what are you going to do?
textByHashes.0831bc06606c1e4880e8010068ff8eadd62503eb: You're a star among builders, that ya are!
textByHashes.4112532a6cdcc6eac0ce23f4285be51ed6b5fc96: Well, I'll be a rabbit in da eyes of a fox! Best ya chase after 'im then and get us our dosh! Don't you do a runner, now!
textByHashes.743ad2fec7ec3b20b36adeb231de038a3a54ee13: I'm glad you've got the money sorted.
textByHashes.19706870e18e3564be1f596f4cb9152fec72c041: Looks like we're out of a job then.
textByHashes.254f9cdd7fe5764b628d6133b54beadcbac0ba78: Nowt at moment. We're on strike!
textByHashes.23db36c201f5d33f694e560bd061198c3dcba942: Those strange alchemists are up ta somefin', best go ta one ov 'em.
textByHashes.b272a09b81ec3e99ed436dc77c704b7c5ae9d0cf: Yeah, we need another job. But til then, we figured we may as well wait ta see what else would turns up.
